distance_to_ocean_mi.description: Straight-line distance to nearest ocean coastline, in miles (LLM-estimated)

bd_score.description: Computed at render time from elevation_ft + distance_to_ocean_mi. Never fetched.

fault_line_distance_mi.description: Distance to nearest major active fault line, in miles

volcano_proximity.description: Nearest active/dormant volcano and approximate distance

wildfire_smoke_days_per_year.description: Average annual days impacted by wildfire smoke

growing_season_length_days.description: Total length of the growing season, in days

monthly_climate_table.description: 12-month table of average high/low temp, rainfall, snowfall. One citation for the whole table (e.g. NOAA climate normals), not per-cell.

annual_sunshine_days.description: Average days of sunshine per year

primary_water_source.description: Where municipal/regional water originates (aquifer, snowpack, river, reservoir)

drought_risk.caveat: Drought risk is a time series, not a single score — reported as current category + historical frequency.
drought_risk.description: Current US Drought Monitor category + historical frequency

well_legality.description: Legal ability to drill a private residential well, state/county restrictions

well_depth_to_water_table_ft.caveat: Depth to water table varies parcel-to-parcel within a county — consult a local driller before relying on this figure.
well_depth_to_water_table_ft.description: Typical depth to water table, in feet

water_rights_restrictions.description: State/county restrictions on private water shares

backup_water_availability.description: Availability of emergency secondary water sources in the region

electricity_rate_cents_per_kwh.description: Average residential electricity rate, cents per kWh

grid_reliability.description: Frequency of power outages/rolling blackouts/seasonal grid failures

solar_score.description: Solar electricity score (Sun Number 1-100 or average peak sun hours)

net_metering_policy.description: State net metering policy (e.g. 1:1 vs wholesale buyback)

demographic_breakdown.description: Brief demographic breakdown of the area

political_leaning.description: County-level political majority / recent voting trends (objective record, neutrally framed)

violent_crime_rate.description: Violent crime rate vs. national average

property_crime_rate.description: Property crime rate vs. national average

carry_law_type.description: State carry law (Constitutional/Permitless vs. Concealed Carry Permit required)

self_defense_legal_status.description: Self-defense legal protections (Stand Your Ground / Castle Doctrine status)

notable_schools_in_city.description: District rating + highest-rated schools within city limits (city-scoped, not address-scoped)

homeschool_regulation_strictness.description: State-level homeschool regulation strictness (Low/None, Moderate, Strict) + key requirements

homeschool_co_op_presence.caveat: Homeschool co-op/umbrella-school presence is sparse and hard to verify via generic search — expect this field to often land as unresolved.
homeschool_co_op_presence.description: Presence of local co-ops, umbrella schools, state-funded hybrid charter programs

trauma_center_distance_mi.description: Distance to nearest Level 1 or Level 2 Trauma Center, in miles (LLM-estimated)

cost_per_acre_unimproved.description: Average cost per acre, unimproved land

cost_per_acre_improved.description: Average cost per acre, improved land

hoa_prevalence.description: Prevalence of HOAs on available lots in the area

state_income_tax_rate.description: State income tax rate (0 if none)

combined_sales_tax_rate.description: Total combined sales tax rate (state + local)

broadband_availability.description: Availability of high-speed fiber / major broadband providers

raw_dairy_legality.description: Raw dairy legality / herd-share laws for buying meat directly from ranchers

farmers_market_density.description: Density of year-round farmers markets or local butchers

airports_within_2hr.description: Major commercial airports within a 2-hour drive, with approximate drive times (LLM-estimated)

metro_hubs_within_6hr.description: Major cities/metro areas within a 6-hour driving radius, with approximate drive times (LLM-estimated)
